problems.diagnostic: No AGREE annex block is present.
problems.cause: There is no AGREE content to repair, and the only reported diagnostics are AADL property/model-analysis errors unrelated to an AGREE annex.
problems.minimal_edit: Do not add or modify any AGREE annex; leave the annex absent unless the underlying AADL property issue is repaired elsewhere.

problems.diagnostic: Source_Stack_Size (property association) does not point to anything
problems.cause: The AADL model has an invalid property association unrelated to AGREE syntax or expressions.
problems.minimal_edit: Do not edit the AGREE annex; repair or remove the invalid Source_Stack_Size property association in the owning AADL declaration.

problems.cause: Model analysis is blocked by the invalid AADL property association, so AGREE repair is not the driver.
problems.minimal_edit: Fix the invalid AADL property association first; make no AGREE edit.

executor_steps: Make no change to MAGNETO or MAGNETO.IMPL AGREE annex content.
Locate the Source_Stack_Size property association on MAGNETO and correct or remove the invalid target/reference in the AADL model.
Re-run AADL analysis after the property fix.
Only if new AGREE-specific diagnostics appear after AADL analysis succeeds, plan a separate AGREE repair from those diagnostics.
